subject: A green-cloaked elven figure with red hair and a glowing green eye, shown in close-up profile against a dark woodland backdrop
description: Tight portrait of an elven planeswalker rendered in profile. Her skin is a warm reddish-brown, her hair is a deep auburn-red pulled back, and one visible eye glows with bright green energy — the signature pose of a planeswalker mid-cast. She wears a hooded cloak in mossy greens and browns layered with leaf-like textures, blending into the foliage behind her. The background is a dim, out-of-focus forest in deep greens and shadowed blacks, giving the figure a near-monochrome green-and-rust palette. Lighting is soft and ambient with a faint green inner glow from the eye providing the only sharp highlight. The mood is determined, focused, and quietly triumphant.
foreground: hooded elven figure in profile, leafy cloak, glowing green eye
background: dim out-of-focus forest, dark foliage, indeterminate woodland
